content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the Holy Sands did not continue to appear, but the Star Soul Sand still appeared one a day.

Ye Tian was the most powerful and the fastest, so he was often able to snatch the Star Soul Sand.

A hundred years later, on this day, a wisp of spatial fluctuations was generated.

"St. Sands is about to appear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough.

A grain of Saint Golden Sands appeared, and it was relatively close to Ye Tian, so Ye Tian appeared beside Saint Jinsha as quickly as possible, forcibly collecting Saint Jinsha, and the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the major Holy Gates, even including those who were first and second on the Supreme Ranking, wanted to snatch this Holy Golden Sands, but they were severely injured by Ye Tian one by one.

Then, they didn't dare to snatch it, and the holy golden sand fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Then, almost every 100 years, St. Sands appeared.

But not every time it was snatched by Ye Tian, once it was far away from Ye Tian, some of the strongest domain ancestors had more peculiar methods, and they could take away the Holy Golden Sands in an instant, of course, they would pay some price, but compared to obtaining the Holy Golden Sands, the price was nothing.

In this regard, Ye Tian was also helpless, he also wanted to snatch away all the Holy Sands, but it was unrealistic.

Time passed slowly in snatching the Star Soul Sand and the Holy Sands.

Millennium!

Years!

100,000 years!

300,000!

A million years!

On this day, many Supreme Domain Ancestors discovered that this treasure land no longer produced Star Soul Sand, and day after day passed, but Star Soul Sand never appeared.

Moreover, they found that the void of this treasure land had become much more fragile.

"This treasure is in ruins!"

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors sighed.

They waited for hundreds of years, and finally could only accept the fact that this treasure land had been abandoned, not only could the Star Soul Sand not be born, but the Holy Sands could not be born at all.

In millions of years, a total of 10,000 Saint Sands were born, and almost all the Supreme Rank Strongest Domain Ancestors came here, so the competition pressure was very high, but in the end, Ye Tian still took away 5,210 Saint Sands, which shows Ye Tian's strength.

Most of the other Saint Sands were taken away by the top ten of the Xeon Domain Ancestors, and a few were taken away by some lucky people.

In addition to a few thousand grains of Saint Sand, Ye Tian also obtained nearly ten million grains of Star Soul Sand.

What is the concept of 10 million Star Soul Sands, which is enough to create 10 million invincible domain ancestors!

Of course, he wouldn't be stupid enough to cultivate 10 million ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestors with 10 million Star Soul Sands, that was not necessary, and the Battle Gate would not cultivate like this.

Moreover, he also needed a large amount of Star Soul Sand to refine his soul and strengthen the soul holy light.

In the past million years, Ye Tian has always needed to pay attention to the birth of the Star Soul Sand and the Holy Sands, so he has almost no time to practice, and the cultivation time is very scattered, but the Soul Holy Light has also improved a lot under the influence of the Star Soul Sand, and now the Soul Holy Light occupies sixty percent of the soul.

"Next, let's retreat for a period of time, condense the Holy Soul, and then my strength can skyrocket, and I can go to some forbidden places in the Holy Soul Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There are many opportunities in the Holy Soul Realm, according to what the Battle Gate said, some forbidden places in the Holy Soul Realm contain great opportunities, but unfortunately some places are too dangerous, and there is no combat power comparable to the ultimate strength of the Invincible Domain Ancestor or comparable to the combat power of the Four-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor, so don't go.

Those who entered the Holy Soul Realm were all Supreme Domain Ancestors, how could their combat power be so high, so those places would be listed as forbidden places.

But once Ye Tian condensed the Holy Soul and his strength soared, those places were no longer forbidden places, but his treasure lands!

Ye Tian found a place and devoted himself to refining the Star Soul Sand.

I have to say that the effect of Star Soul Sand is indeed very good.

While refining the Star Soul Sand, Ye Tian's soul holy light grew rapidly.

With Ye Tian's refining speed, he could refine one grain of Star Soul Sand in almost a year, and ten thousand grains of Star Soul Sand could make his soul holy light increase from sixty percent of his soul to seventy percent of his soul, and it might be more difficult to increase it later.

According to Ye Tian's estimate, he probably only needed 100,000 grains of Star Soul Sand, and he was 100% sure that he would condense the Holy Soul.

Refining 100,000 grains of Star Soul Sand, for him, is 100,000 years.

In just 100,000 years, the Holy Soul can be condensed, which is very fast.

Ye Tian is refining the Star Soul Sand in the time array environment, and the time of the real outside world will only pass a year at that time.

It can be seen from this that the effect of Star Soul Sand is awesome!

One grain after another of Star Soul Sand was refined by Ye Tian, and finally 100,000 Star Soul Sand grains were consumed by Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the breakthrough stage, his soul holy light was almost full of his entire soul, and only a trace of soul was left that had not been completely transformed into soul holy light.

As a result, Ye Tian refined another grain of Star Soul Sand, and under the effect of this Star Soul Sand, his last trace of soul was also transformed into Soul Holy Light.

Finally, the qualitative change began!!

Countless soul holy lights began to compress, just like Ye Tian's soul holy light at this moment seemed to have hundreds of millions of feet in the soul sea, but under the infinite compression, it gradually changed towards the normal human body shape.

As the soul holy light compressed, Ye Tian's body was filled with an incomparably terrifying soul coercion.

After a long time, Ye Tian's holy soul was finally condensed.

As soon as the Holy Soul was completed, Ye Tian obviously felt that his strength had improved a lot.

Urging the Holy Soul, his combat power will be very terrifying, and the power of the Holy Soul is close to infinity, and it can recover quickly, so it can fight for a long time.

"My current strength should be comparable to the invincible domain ancestor combat power of the five-step extreme!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

He wouldn't think that his strength would be able to cross the boundary of the five-step Invincible Domain Ancestor and the four-step Invincible Domain Ancestor in one step, it would be too difficult.

Five steps or more of the invincible domain ancestor, every step crossed, the difference in strength is very large.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, unless he cultivated his ancestral technique to the Xiaocheng realm, or underwent a second qualitative transformation of the Holy Soul, it would be possible to break the shackles of combat power and reach the four-step invincible domain ancestral combat power.

"It takes a long time to cultivate the ancestral technique, I don't have time to cultivate the ancestral technique now, but the Holy Soul, I can completely let it undergo a secondary qualitative change!"

Ye Tian thought.

He still has a lot of holy golden sands in his hands, once he refines those holy golden sands, he can promote the holy soul to undergo a secondary qualitative change, and the holy soul will become even more terrifying, and it is said that special characteristics will be born, some of which are very rebellious.

"Then let's refine the Holy Sands!"

Ye Tian took out a Saint Sands and swallowed it into the Soul Sea, while his Saint Soul began to absorb the power of the Saint Sands.
